2026-04-21T17:51:35.9040093Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-21T17:51:35.9040685Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-21T17:51:35.9041122Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-21T17:51:35.9041651Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-21T17:51:35.9041965Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-21T17:51:35.9042219Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-21T17:51:35.9042391Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-21T17:51:35.9042568Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-21T17:51:35.9042734Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-21T17:51:35.9042962Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-21T17:51:35.9043160Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-21T17:51:35.9043446Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-21T17:51:35.9043701Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
